title: Casa Grande is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Casa Grande is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!
